title: Basque LLM Evaluation
subtitle: Comparative evaluation on EusTrivia, XNLIeu, BasqueGLUE-QNLI, BasqueGLUE-BEC, BasqueGLUE-WiC, BasqueGLUE-Intent, LatxaEval-EusExams, LatxaEval-EusProficiency, LatxaEval-EusReading, FLORES EU→EN, FLORES EN→EU, FLORES EU→ES, FLORES ES→EU (multi-seed robust view)

evaluation_protocol.sampling: 80 items per benchmark (1040 total per model)

benchmarks.task: Multiple-choice factual and cultural knowledge in Basque
benchmarks.label: EusTrivia

benchmarks.task: Question-Answer NLI from BasqueGLUE (sentence pair classification)
benchmarks.label: BasqueGLUE-QNLI
